text: Two new diagrams: the agent/grader iteration layers on Grading, and stations-versus-loop on Roles.
Loop time horizons retuned to METR's evidence: elastic spans minutes to hours, loose runs multiple hours, not days.
Verification cost: how many loops can one person close? Added to Harness and Loops.
The one-sentence formula gains its fourth verb: verification closes the loop.
First public draft: the hub and all five sections, seeded.
